name: renpy-analytics
description: Structure folding, story-flow analysis, save-file safety checks, and writing metrics for Ren'Py projects. Companion to vscode-language-renpy and renpy-magic.

commands.title: Ren'Py: Generate Footers for All Files

renpy-analytics.saveSafety.enabled.description: Report save-file safety risks (define'd variables changed at runtime, mutable define literals, variables created inside labels without a default) in the Problems panel.

renpy-analytics.gameDir.description: Restrict analysis to this folder (workspace-relative or absolute). Leave empty to analyze every .rpy file in the workspace. Useful in monorepos containing several copies of a game — set it via the 'Ren'Py: Select Game Folder' command.

renpy-analytics.extraEntryPoints.description: Additional label names treated as reachability roots (e.g. labels entered via config.label_overrides or custom launchers).

renpy-analytics.footer.sections.description: Which sections the generated file footer includes. Teams that don't want variable lists in shipped scripts can drop 'variables'.

renpy-analytics.footer.onSave.description: Regenerate the footer on save for files that already contain one (files without a footer are never touched).

enumDescriptions: Report inaccessible labels as warnings even when dynamic jumps exist (messages note possible false positives).
Downgrade inaccessible-label findings to Information when the project contains dynamic jumps.
renpy-analytics.dynamicJumpMode.description: How to report inaccessible labels when the project contains dynamic jumps ('jump expression …') whose targets can't be resolved statically.
